title: New #1 open-source AI model is here!
summary: GLM 5.2 is presented as a top open-source AI model with capabilities spanning text generation, code integration, 3D model generation, animation, and music composition. The model is accessible through multiple interfaces including web chat, Claude code integration, and a coding plan subscription.
writeup: This video from AI Search covers GLM 5.2, presented as a leading open-source AI model. It walks through capabilities that span text generation, code integration, 3D model generation, animation, and music composition. The takeaways are practical access points: a web chat interface, Claude code integration, and a coding plan subscription.
